channel.title: Posts on rohanrd.xyz
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on rohanrd.xyz

item.title: Self Hosting Password Manager
item.description: Are you tired of entrusting your passwords and personal information to third-party services that may or may not have your best interests at heart? Are you ready to take control of your own data and security? If so, self-hosting a password manager might be the perfect adventure for you! It takes a bit of technical know-how and a whole lot of bravery, but the rewards are well worth it. Not only will you have the peace of mind that comes with knowing your sensitive information is being stored on your own servers, but you’ll also have the opportunity to customize your password management solution to suit your specific needs.

item.title: RSS Readers That You Can Self Host
item.description: Self-hosted RSS readers offer users a way to customize their feeds and have more control over their data and privacy. One of the main advantages of using a self-hosted RSS reader is that it allows you to avoid the algorithms that drive many commercial platforms. These algorithms are designed to show you content that they think you’ll be interested in based on your past browsing history and other factors. With a self-hosted RSS reader, you have complete control over what you see in your feed and can customize it to your liking.

item.title: I Created Entire App in 30 Min With ChatGPT
item.description: I have been playing around with ChatGPT for quite some time now and have used it for quite a few things like blog posts, generation of thumbnails, simple programs, random research on certain topics, etc,. Now I wanted to see just how useful ChatGPT can be if I am starting a project from scratch. I started working on this project called Echoes of Eternity. The app sounds very fancy but it’s actually very simple.
